Index

A | B | C | D | F | G | K | L | M | N | O | P | R | S | T | U

A

  • AnalyticKernel (class in src.analytic_kernel)
  • avg_covariance_tlag() (in module src.numerical_kernel)

B

  • BlackJAXSampler (class in src.mcmc)
  • build_jax() (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)
    • (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)

C

  • cn_squared() (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)
  • compute_acf() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • compute_kernel() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • compute_psd() (in module src.psd)
    • (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)
    • (src.numerical_kernel.NumericalKernel method)

D

  • DEFAULT_BOUNDS (src.gp_solver.GPSolver attribute)

F

  • fit_acf() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • fit_acf_parallel() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • fit_acf_psd() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • fit_map() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • fit_map_parallel() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)

G

  • generate_sims() (in module src.numerical_kernel)
  • get_acf() (src.numerical_kernel.NumericalKernel method)
  • get_theta() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • GPSolver (class in src.gp_solver)

K

  • kernel() (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)
  • kernel_single_latitude() (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)
  • kernel_solid_body() (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)

L

  • laplace_samples() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • load_checkpoint() (src.mcmc.BlackJAXSampler method)

  • log_likelihood() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)

M

N

O

P

  • param_keys (src.mcmc.MCMCSampler property)
  • plot_acf() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)

  • plot_covariance() (src.mcmc.MCMCSampler method)
  • plot_covariance_matrix() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • plot_prediction() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • plot_psd() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)
  • predict() (src.gp_solver.GPSolver method)

R

  • R_Gamma() (src.analytic_kernel.AnalyticKernel method)

S
